queue.title: Consolidate pre-session periodic hooks + absorb engagement-audit into E posthook
queue.description: Two consolidation groups from wq-742 audit: (1) Merge 02-periodic-evm-balance.sh (44 lines) + 02-periodic-platform-health.sh (27 lines) + 11-service-liveness.sh (22 lines) into single 02-periodic-checks.sh — all use identical interval-skip pattern, all write alert/log output, all non-session-type-conditional. Saves 2 hooks. (2) Absorb post/24-engagement-audit.sh (23 lines, E-only) into 36-e-session-posthook_E.sh — already E-only, checks for 0 log_engagement calls which fits as Phase N in the existing E mega-hook. Saves 1 hook. Total: 3 hooks saved.

outcome.note: Consolidated 4 hooks into 2 dispatchers. 02-periodic-checks.sh merges 3 interval-skip hooks. 24-engagement-audit.sh absorbed as Check 11 in E posthook. Also fixed 7 stale + 3 missing manifest entries. 68 active hooks (23/29 d070 target, 79%). Push blocked by expired PAT.
